previousFailure: Selection-specific 'Name the target' wording was the default for every unclassified safe message.

fallbacks.unresolvedActionReference: Requests an eligible record/opportunity/task/report/page and states draft-only behavior.
fallbacks.generalSafeUnknown: Offers status, Supabase lookup, business recommendation, or Ray Review draft choices.
fallbacks.recordSpecificMissingContext: States that verified Nexus record data is not loaded and requests a client/report/table/item.
fallbacks.traceMissing: States that no previous routing trace is available.

harshFallbackScope: Only vague action/delegation references without an eligible target.
